response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: No lyric lookup was necessary as there is no vocal music in this video. 2. JSON Usage: The scene reference was used to identify the players and context of the video. Manual transcription was fully performed to capture and translate the English and Japanese dialogue between the VTubers. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timings are strictly anchored to the audio vocalizations. Aggressive truncation was applied during fast overlapping speech to maintain clarity and prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: Wow.
So how was that raid, Nino-Ina?
subtitles.english: So how was that raid, Nino-Ina?

subtitles.original: Ah, I got one common...
...enhancement part. Wow.
All right, follow me.
Huh? Okay.
I shall reward you for your services.
subtitles.english: I shall reward you for your services.

subtitles.original: Say what?
You may put up something random for 278,940 Yen.
subtitles.english: You may put up something random for 278,940 Yen.

subtitles.original: Two hundred...
Exactly.
Oh, is that the money you...
subtitles.english: Oh, is that the money you...

subtitles.original: You can buy my books instead! I put some books.
subtitles.english: You can buy my books instead! I put some books.

subtitles.original: No, no, no, I need this money...
subtitles.english: No, no, no, I need this money...

subtitles.original: No, I can't put any more stuff...
subtitles.english: No, I can't put any more stuff...

subtitles.original: ...'cause I hit the limit of the amount of stuff you can put up.
subtitles.english: ...'cause I hit the limit of the amount of stuff you can put up.

subtitles.original: Okay, I'll buy one of this and then you can put up...
subtitles.english: Okay, I'll buy one of this and then you can put up...

subtitles.original: Okay, you can put up 211,264.
No! Buy them instead!
Anya... Ina...
あにゃ、いな。
Hello アキ先輩！ / アキ先輩！
アキ先輩、私の本買いませんか？今売ってるんですけど。
subtitles.english: Aki-senpai, won't you buy my book? I'm selling it right now.

subtitles.original: 本？
うん。あにゃの本買って？
あにゃの本を...買うとしたら...
subtitles.english: If I were to buy Anya's book...

subtitles.original: あにゃは、アキが何でもひとつ言うこと聞く券を1000万円で買いませんか？
subtitles.english: Anya, would you buy a ticket for Aki to do whatever you say for 10 million yen?

subtitles.original: 1000万円。何でも。
何でもだよ。
リアルのことでいう、何でもひとつ言うこと聞く。
subtitles.english: Even in real life, I'll do any one thing you say.

subtitles.original: リアルのこともいい？
そう。
おおお...どうしよういな？いなどうしよう？
subtitles.english: Ooo... what should we do, Ina? Ina, what should we do?

subtitles.original: いいじゃない？
買っちゃう？
買っちゃえ！買っちゃえ！
いいじゃない？
何でもだよ！
何でもだよ、あにゃ！何でもって...
subtitles.english: It's for anything, Anya! She said anything...

subtitles.original: ...何でもだよ。
1000万円はきついです。すみません、アキ先輩。
subtitles.english: 10 million yen is a bit much. I'm sorry, Aki-senpai.

subtitles.original: あにゃはまだこの世界でトップを取ろうとしている？
subtitles.english: Is Anya still aiming to take the top in this world?

subtitles.original: え、さすがに無理だと思います。
subtitles.english: Eh, I think that's logically impossible.

subtitles.original: じゃ、1000万円買ったほうがお得なんじゃない？この...
subtitles.english: Then, wouldn't buying it for 10 million yen be a bargain? In this...

subtitles.original: ね、いな？
ね！
アキ先輩は狙ってるですか？トップを。
subtitles.english: Aki-senpai, are you aiming for the top?

subtitles.original: まあまあ、狙ってる。頑張ろうかなって。
subtitles.english: Well, I am. I'm thinking of doing my best.

subtitles.original: おおお...
なるほど。
いな、ちなみに、アキせんの何でもひとつ...いなめっちゃ金持ちだから、買ったら、いな？
subtitles.english: Ina, by the way, Aki-sen's 'do anything' coupon... Ina, you're super rich, so why don't you buy it, Ina?

subtitles.original: いなは...75,912円、だけ。どうですか？
subtitles.english: Ina has... only 75,912 Yen. How about that?

subtitles.original: 7万5千9百12円。
あ、ちょっと7万円では聞けない...いな。
subtitles.english: Ah, I can't listen to a request for just 70,000, Ina.

subtitles.original: ええ？アキ先輩いいですか？こんなかわいいかわいいいなちゃんのお願いなんですよ。
subtitles.english: Eee? Aki-senpai, is that okay? This is a request from the super cute Ina-chan.

subtitles.original: いなのことはとってもかわいいし大好きな果んだけど、何でも...
subtitles.english: I find Ina super cute and I love her, but doing anything...

subtitles.original: そんなにかわいくないですか、アキ先輩？(笑)
subtitles.english: Is she not that cute, Aki-senpai?

subtitles.original: こんなかわいいかわいいいなのお願い...いいんですか？本当に。
subtitles.english: Are you really okay refusing a request from this super cute Ina?

subtitles.original: あにゃが1000万円で言うこと聞く券買ううんだったら、いなのお願いも聞いちゃおうかな。
subtitles.english: If Anya buys the 10-million-yen 'do anything' coupon, maybe I'll listen to Ina's request.

subtitles.original: それだったら...それだったら、500万、500万で済むんじゃないですか？一人。
subtitles.english: If that's the case... if that's the case, wouldn't 5 million each make it work?

subtitles.original: いや、1000万円からじゃないといけないんですかね？一個の...一個のお願いが1000万円だから。
subtitles.english: No, does it have to start from 10 million yen? Because one request is 10 million yen.

subtitles.original: ねええ...
嫌だなの？嫌だ...
買って、買って... / 買ってよ、あにゃ、買って。
subtitles.english: Buy it, buy it... / Buy it Anya, buy it.

subtitles.original: 何でも言うこと聞くよ。肩のマッサージもするよ。
subtitles.english: I'll do whatever you say. I'll even give you a shoulder massage.

subtitles.original: ええ？
